title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 128.120 - Compensation of elector
text:
128.120.  Compensation of elector. — The electors shall each receive for their services the sum of five dollars per day and mileage as allowed to the members of the general assembly.  The governor shall approve their accounts and certify them to the commissioner of administration for payment.
(RSMo 1939 § 12322, A. 1949 H.B. 2061) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10741; 1919 § 5296; 1909 § 2755
